headline: Generac and CPower Expand Access to DER Technologies to Support Resiliency, Energy Costs and Grid Capacity
summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC), a leading U.S.-based global designer and manufacturer of power generation and energy storage products and solutions, and CPower Energy ("CPower"), a leading Virtual Power Plant (VPP) platform, today announced a collaboration to support commercial and industrial (C&I) customers across PJM, North America's largest grid, by leveraging distributed generation to achieve greater resiliency and demand response outcomes at a time when soaring electricity demand is pus
